summary:
OPERATOR INTERACTION MATRIX — ALGEBRAIC STRUCTURE OF DAMAGE OPERATORS
======================================================================

Evidence: 83 chains, 194 operations, 153 ethno systems
Classification: {'INDEPENDENT': 36, 'SYNERGISTIC': 18, 'ANTAGONISTIC': 18}

9x9 INTERACTION MATRIX (row=FROM, col=TO):
              CONCEDISTREXTENHIERAINVERPARTIQUANTRANDOTRUNC
   CONCENTRATE  --- IND IND IND SYN ANT IND IND SYN
    DISTRIBUTE IND  --- SYN IND IND ANT IND IND SYN
        EXTEND IND SYN  --- ANT SYN IND IND SYN SYN
   HIERARCHIZE IND IND ANT  --- ANT IND IND IND ANT
        INVERT SYN IND SYN ANT  --- IND ANT ANT SYN
     PARTITION ANT ANT IND IND IND  --- IND IND IND
      QUANTIZE IND IND IND IND ANT IND  --- ANT ANT
     RANDOMIZE IND IND SYN IND ANT IND ANT  --- SYN
      TRUNCATE SYN SYN SYN ANT SYN IND ANT SYN  ---

KEY FINDINGS:
  Most synergistic: EXTEND->TRUNCATE
    strength=9.5, co-occur=10, step-separation=1.0, A-before-B=0.9
  Most antagonistic: CONCENTRATE->PARTITION
    shared primitives=['BREAK_SYMMETRY'], co-occur=0
  Top enabler (highest synergy-out): TRUNCATE (enables 5 others)
  Most enabled (highest synergy-in): TRUNCATE (enabled by 5 others)

OPERATOR ORDERING (early->late in reasoning chains):
       RANDOMIZE: 0.929 ##################
     CONCENTRATE: 0.900 ##################
      DISTRIBUTE: 0.857 #################
          INVERT: 0.667 #############
          EXTEND: 0.556 ###########
     HIERARCHIZE: 0.500 ##########
       PARTITION: 0.500 ##########
        QUANTIZE: 0.500 ##########
        TRUNCATE: 0.029 

SYNERGISTIC 3-CYCLES: 8
  CONCENTRATE -> INVERT -> TRUNCATE -> CONCENTRATE
  CONCENTRATE -> TRUNCATE -> INVERT -> CONCENTRATE
  DISTRIBUTE -> EXTEND -> TRUNCATE -> DISTRIBUTE
  DISTRIBUTE -> TRUNCATE -> EXTEND -> DISTRIBUTE
  EXTEND -> INVERT -> TRUNCATE -> EXTEND
  EXTEND -> RANDOMIZE -> TRUNCATE -> EXTEND
  EXTEND -> TRUNCATE -> INVERT -> EXTEND
  EXTEND -> TRUNCATE -> RANDOMIZE -> EXTEND
MUTUAL SYNERGY PAIRS: 9
  CONCENTRATE <-> INVERT
  CONCENTRATE <-> TRUNCATE
  DISTRIBUTE <-> EXTEND
  DISTRIBUTE <-> TRUNCATE
  EXTEND <-> INVERT
  EXTEND <-> RANDOMIZE
  EXTEND <-> TRUNCATE
  INVERT <-> TRUNCATE
  RANDOMIZE <-> TRUNCATE

STRUCTURAL INTERPRETATION:
  The 9 damage operators form a partially ordered algebra with
  18 synergistic, 18 antagonistic, 0 redundant, 36 independent pairs.
  8 feedback cycles found — self-reinforcing damage patterns.
  9 mutual synergy pairs — bidirectional enabling.

FAMILY ANALYSIS:
  symmetry: {'INDEPENDENT': 2, 'ANTAGONISTIC': 4}
  scale: {'ANTAGONISTIC': 4, 'SYNERGISTIC': 2}
  transform: {'ANTAGONISTIC': 6}
